raw.message: Com a partir de R$6,90, adicione um Chicken Jr., 6 BK Chicken ou um sundae de doce de leite ao seu pedido!

hook.summary: Fast-paced showcase of budget-friendly Burger King menu items with bold price overlays.
hook.visual_action: A static graphic transitions into a slideshow of food combos starting at R$ 6,90.

scene_flow: Introduction of the KingOfertas promotion featuring the R$ 6,90 price tier with Chicken Jr. and nuggets.
Transition to the R$ 8,90 tier showcasing the Cheeseburger, nuggets with sauce, and a brownie.
Final reveal of the R$ 10,90 tier featuring the Rodeio burger, 10 nuggets, and a BK Mix dessert.
audience_proxy: Budget-conscious fast-food consumers in Brazil looking for affordable meal deals and snacks.
